summary: Synthetic DNS resolver latency is the most likely cause of elevated checkout API latency for the affected client segment.

steps.name: Validate symptom scope
steps.result: Latency increase is isolated to synthetic-office-a and does not affect synthetic-office-b.

steps.name: Inspect synthetic DNS timing
steps.result: DNS lookup p95 increased from 35 ms to 780 ms during the reported window.

steps.name: Compare application processing time
steps.result: Application handler p95 stayed below 90 ms, making backend saturation unlikely.

findings.description: Synthetic resolver endpoint in the affected segment shows elevated lookup latency.
findings.recommendedAction: Fail over the synthetic client segment to the secondary resolver and monitor lookup p95.
